context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Decorative element, indicates cage completeness (not interactive in current version)
context.screen_position: Bottom-left at (40, 100), to the right of food bowl
context.usage_scenario: Always visible, always full. Purely decorative - no gameplay interaction. Provides visual balance with food bowl.

visual_specification.shape: Small bowl viewed from above, circular top view

animation.description: No animation. Always shows full water state.

visual_specification.details: Brown bowl (#AB5236) outline, 12px wide, 10px tall. Interior filled with blue water (#29ADFF). Water surface: flat, no ripples. Slightly smaller than food bowl. Simple oval shape. Always appears full.

relationships.shared_with: Brown bowl color with food_bowl and perch
relationships.differences_from: food_bowl: smaller vs larger, blue water vs orange seeds, static vs 3 states, decorative vs interactive.

explicit_negations: Water does not ripple or animate
No reflection or shine on water surface
Echo does not drink from it visually
